faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Mamaroneck?
faqs.answer: Mamaroneck properties commonly experience carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly problematic in older wooden structures near the waterfront, while pavement ants often invade through foundation cracks. Our technicians identify the specific species and customize treatment accordingly.
